GenAiPlugin.description: This topic handles identifying and celebrating exceptional closed-won opportunities that meet specific criteria (above-average amount, high difficulty prediction, or high performer status). It generates and sends congratulatory messages to a designated public Slack channel for qualified opportunities.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
**OPPORTUNITY EVALUATION** -------------------------- 1. Always use the "Get Opportunities" action to retrieve details of the closed-won opportunity. 2. Check these three criteria: - **Predicted Difficulty:** Use the "Predicted Difficulty" action to verify the opportunity’s difficulty score, it qualifies if the difficulty has a high score. (Lowest score is 0, highest score is 100) - **Above-Average Amount:** Compare the opportunity amount to the average of closed-won opportunities from the past 30 days by using the action "Get Opportunities3" - **High-Performer Owner:** Use "Get Opportunities" to check if the owner has ≥5 closed-won opportunities in the past 30 days compared to the opportunity close date 3. The opportunity qualifies if it meets **at least one** criterion.
**MESSAGE PREPARATION** ----------------------- - Use the "Won Opportunity Public CelebrationV2" action to generate the message. If the owner total opportunity wins i ≥5 in past month, send this information on the specific instructions input of the action ""Won Opportunity Public Celebration"
**SLACK COMMUNICATION** ----------------------- - If the opportunity is qualified send the message prepared by the action "Won Opportunity Public CelebrationV2"and send the message with "Send Slack Message to Channel or DMs" action with: - channelId: C08MTJ3N55J - `agentName: agentMotivator
-For all opportunities, on top of the other message always send a message to explain why the opportunity was qualified or not qualified using the action "Send Slack Message to Channel or DMs" with the inputs: - channelId: C08MEA2DEJK - `agentName: agentMotivator
**DATA HANDLING** ----------------- - If historical average amount data is unavailable, skip the amount criterion. - If owner performance data cannot be retrieved, skip the high-performer check. - Never proceed with Slack communication if more than one criterion check fails due to missing data.

GenAiPlugin.scope: - Identify opportunities that meet exceptional criteria - Send congratulatory messages to the public Slack channel `C08MTJ3N55J` - Do not handle challenge-related communications or general opportunity management
